# DeadlockMaster AI - Stats & Guides

> Chrome extension combining a Deadlock player stats tracker with hero guides, counter picks, mechanics tutorials, live objective timers, automated patch notes, and on-device AI coaching.

## What Is DeadlockMaster AI?

DeadlockMaster AI is a Chrome browser extension that provides a comprehensive in-browser toolset for Deadlock (a 6v6 MOBA-shooter by Valve). It renders in Chrome's native sidebar panel so players can track stats and reference guides without alt-tabbing out of the game.

## Core Features

### Player Stats Tracker (Free)
- Search any player by Steam64 ID, Steam32 ID, or Steam vanity URL
- Displays current rank tier (Obscurus through Eternus) with colour-coded badge
- Win rate, W/L record, total matches, average KDA
- Per-hero breakdown: games played, win rate bar, average KDA per hero
- Last 15 match history: hero, KDA, win/loss, duration, date
- Recent searches saved for quick access
- Links to deadlock.gg for full profile

### Automated Patch Notes (Free)
- Auto-fetched from Steam's official ISteamNews API (appid 1422450)
- Refreshed every hour — no manual input ever needed
- Red dot notification on nav tab when new patch arrives
- Expandable full notes per patch, direct Steam link
- Background fetch on startup keeps data fresh

### Hero Guides (3 Free, All 25 on Pro)
- Ability breakdowns with cooldowns and coaching tips
- Phase-by-phase item builds with accurate soul costs: T1=500, T2=1250, T3=3000, T4=6200
- Power spike timings
- Counter picks: heroes that counter them, heroes they beat, counter items to buy
- Laning tips, teamfight strategies, common mistakes

### Free Heroes
- Abrams (melee tank brawler)
- Haze (stealth gun carry)
- Infernus (fire spirit mage)

### Pro Heroes (all 25)
Yamato, Bebop, Dynamo, Seven, Lash, Vindicta, Grey Talon, Lady Geist, Kelvin, Warden, McGinnis, Shiv, Paradox, Pocket, Ivy, Viscous, Wraith, Mo & Krill, Holliday, Mirage, Sinclair, Calico

### Mechanics Library (Free)
Dashing, wall jumping, bunny hopping, parrying, mantle slides, air strafing, zip line techniques, stamina management, wave farming, macro strategy

### Live Objective Timers (Free)
9 objectives tracked: Bridge Buffs (5:00), Medium Camps (6:00), Large Camps (8:00), Urn (10:00), Rejuvenator (10:00), Small Camps (2:00), Soul Crates, Slot Machine, Patron Guardians

### AI Coach (Pro)
On-device Gemini Nano via Chrome Prompt API. Answers about builds, counters, mechanics, timers — fully private, no data sent externally. Smart fallback knowledge base when AI unavailable.

### Saved Builds (Pro)
Save up to 50 builds, copy as plain text, manage library across sessions.

## Rank System (All 12 Tiers Tracked)
Obscurus → Initiate (I-VI) → Seeker (I-VI) → Alchemist (I-VI) → Arcanist (I-VI) → Ritualist (I-VI) → Emissary (I-VI) → Archon (I-VI) → Oracle (I-VI) → Phantom (I-VI) → Ascendant (I-VI) → Eternus

## Pricing
- Free: Stats tracker, patch notes, mechanics, timers, 3 hero guides
- Monthly: $7.99/month — all 25 heroes, AI Coach, saved builds, counter picker
- Yearly: $69/year — all monthly features
- Lifetime: $159 one-time — everything forever

## External APIs Used
- api.deadlock-api.com — player stats, match history, hero stats (only when user searches)
- api.steampowered.com — patch notes via ISteamNews (hourly background fetch)
- steamcommunity.com — Steam vanity URL to Steam64 ID resolution (only when user enters a name)
- extensionpay.com — subscription verification only

## Technical
- Chrome Manifest V3 extension
- Minimum Chrome version: 116
- AI: Chrome Prompt API / Gemini Nano (on-device only)
- Payments: ExtensionPay
- No analytics, no personal data collection
